patches.find: in WIN-029 and WIN-048, where its own H(r) at H_max produces ~8.78 Hz
patches.replace: in WIN-029 (Schumann conductive ceiling) and WIN-048 (CMB observability), where the dome's own H(r) at H_max yields a fundamental quarter-wave of ~8.78 Hz (the pole-floor derivation in WIN-038)
patches.rationale: M3 carry-over from WIN-034.c5.json: detail_verdict_text cross-WIN attribution labels were missing. The q357 patch fixed finding and tldr_verdict but left detail_verdict_text with bare WIN-029/WIN-048 references without identifying labels and without noting WIN-038 is the Schumann-derivation source.

ISS-2010 BAU triage: 'SC pattern (2)' was the only occurrence of the SC-pattern numbering convention site-wide, implying a numbered taxonomy that does not exist. Dropping the '(2)' resolves the orphaned reference while preserving the existing inline gloss.
